ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "plural" INTEGER /* Indicator for multiple births (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 = male, 2 = female) */,
  "mom_age" INTEGER /* Age of the mother at the time of birth */,
  "weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks of gestation */,
  "marital" INTEGER /* Marital status of the mother (1 = married, 0 = not married) */,
  "race_mom" INTEGER /* Race of the mother (1 = white, 2 = black, 3 = other) */,
  "hisp_mom" TEXT /* Hispanic origin of the mother (N = no, Y = yes) */,
  "gained" INTEGER /* Weight gained by the mother during pregnancy (in pounds) */,
  "smoke" INTEGER /* Indicator for smoking during pregnancy (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "birth_weight_oz" REAL /* Birth weight of the patient in ounces */,
  "birth_weight_gm" REAL /* Birth weight of the patient in grams */,
  "low_birth_weight" INTEGER /* Indicator for low birth weight (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "premie" INTEGER /* Indicator for premature birth (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of patient discharge */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Brief description of the treatment plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the medical facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the medical facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of medical facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the medical facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical facility the doctor is affiliated with */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree held by the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "nurse_name" TEXT /* Name of the nurse */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical facility the nurse is affiliated with */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree held by the nurse */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the nurse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the nurse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the nurse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the nurse record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the nurse record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment belongs to */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "reason_for_visit" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the appointment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Lab test that was conducted */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the lab result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the lab result was recorded */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the lab test */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the lab result */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the lab result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the lab result (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medication belongs to */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "reason_for_prescription" TEXT /* Reason for prescribing the medication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, view record) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
